required_fields.label: Sector / industry
required_fields.placeholder: e.g., Enterprise SaaS, Healthcare, Consumer Fintech

required_fields.label: Deal type
required_fields.placeholder: e.g., Series A equity, Growth equity, Acquisition, Debt

required_fields.label: Investment thesis
required_fields.placeholder: Why is this an attractive investment? What is the core thesis driving the opportunity?

required_fields.label: Financial overview
required_fields.placeholder: Key financial metrics: revenue, growth rate, margins, burn rate, valuation, and proposed terms...

required_fields.label: Key risk factors
required_fields.placeholder: What are the primary risks to this investment? Market, execution, competitive, regulatory...

optional_fields.label: Comparable transactions
optional_fields.placeholder: Recent comparable deals, acquisitions, or funding rounds in the sector...

optional_fields.label: Management team assessment
optional_fields.placeholder: Quality of management team, track record, and any concerns...

optional_fields.label: Due diligence status
optional_fields.placeholder: What DD has been completed? What remains?

optional_fields.label: Expected exit scenarios
optional_fields.placeholder: Potential exit paths, timeline, and expected returns...

file_upload_prompts.label: Upload financial statements, models, or cap tables
Upload pitch decks, info memos, or data room documents
Upload comparable analysis or market research
Upload firm brand guidelines or memo template (optional)

sections.label: Investment Thesis
sections.instructions: Clear articulation of why this investment is attractive. Cover the core thesis, key value drivers, and expected return profile.

sections.label: Company Overview
sections.instructions: Company background, founding story, product/service description, business model, and current stage of development.

sections.label: Market Opportunity
sections.instructions: TAM/SAM/SOM analysis, market dynamics, growth drivers, and the company's positioning within the market.

sections.label: Financial Analysis
sections.instructions: Detailed financial review covering historical performance, unit economics, projections, and key assumptions. Include revenue model analysis.

sections.label: Valuation Analysis
sections.instructions: Valuation methodology, comparable analysis, implied multiples, and assessment of whether the proposed valuation is fair.

sections.label: Risk Factors
sections.instructions: Comprehensive risk assessment covering market, execution, competitive, financial, and regulatory risks with severity ratings.

sections.label: Due Diligence Findings
sections.instructions: Summary of completed due diligence including legal, financial, technical, and commercial findings. Flag any material issues.

sections.label: Recommendation
sections.instructions: Clear invest/pass recommendation with key conditions, proposed terms, and critical follow-up items before closing.
